parents.subject: LU-16222 kernel: RHEL 8.7 client and server support

commit.subject: LU-16339 tests: pool quota hung on write
commit.message:
LU-16339 tests: pool quota hung on write

Add test 84 into sanity-quota to check that write
doesn't hung if qunit initial value is equal to
the least_qunit due to small block hard limit.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-10711
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-quota env=ONLY=84
Change-Id: I2a8bc584afcc538be55902f74681ff23bfcbb753
Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <sergey.cheremencev@hpe.com>
Reviewed-on: https://es-gerrit.dev.cray.com/160009
Reviewed-by: Alexander Boyko <c17825@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Elena Gryaznova <elena.gryaznova@hpe.com>
Tested-by: Elena Gryaznova <elena.gryaznova@hpe.com>
